text.tspan: Serial GC (1.0) → Parallel GC (1.4, 멀티코어 대응) → CMS (1.4, 동시 마킹)

text.font-family: -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Apple SD Gothic Neo','Pretendard','Noto Sans KR','Malgun Gothic','Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif
text.tspan: → G1 (1.7u4 experimental, 1.9 default) — Region 기반, 예측 가능한 STW

text.font-family: -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Apple SD Gothic Neo','Pretendard','Noto Sans KR','Malgun Gothic','Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif
text.tspan: → ZGC (11 experimental, 15 prod, 21 generational) — Colored Pointer, sub-ms pause

text.font-family: -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Apple SD Gothic Neo','Pretendard','Noto Sans KR','Malgun Gothic','Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif
text.tspan: → Shenandoah (12+, RedHat) — Brooks/Load Reference Barrier, 동시 압축

text.font-family: -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Apple SD Gothic Neo','Pretendard','Noto Sans KR','Malgun Gothic','Helvetica Neue',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif
text.tspan: CMS는 9에서 deprecated, 14에서 제거. "Concurrent Mode Failure" 안정성 이슈 + G1과 기능 중복.
